title: 谋杀启事
summary:
Inspector Corrado questions Edmund Swetnam regarding his motive to kill Miss Blacklock for her inheritance. Edmund denies being "Pip," the heir, but Philippa Hemmings steps forward to reveal that she is Pip. Philippa explains she is the daughter of the Goodel family and sought employment at the house to secure funds for her son Harry's education; she admits she feared being a suspect because she was the only person known to have a motive.

A scream from the kitchen interrupts the tension. In the kitchen, Miss Blacklock attempts to murder Midge by plunging her head into a sink full of water. Miss Marple, who had been hiding in a broom cupboard, interrupts the attack by using her ability to imitate voices to mimic the voice of Dora Bunner. The sudden sound causes Miss Blacklock to release Midge. Chief Constable Fletcher arrives to arrest Miss Blacklock, who is revealed to be Charlotte Blacklock. Miss Marple explains she has known the truth for some time. A distraught Charlotte admits to the killings but claims she did not want to kill anyone. Miss Quincannon attempts to attack Charlotte, accusing her of murdering Amy Muggleton.

Later, at the parsonage, the group gathers to discuss the case. Miss Marple reflects on how she was initially fooled, but eventually realized that Miss Blacklock was the most likely person to have orchestrated the robbery, as only the homeowner could have arranged specific conditions, such as turning off the central heating, to facilitate the crime.
